# Chapter 3: Water: supply, sanitation, climate  (~100 pp)
- 3.1 The water cycle as engineered domain (12) · 3.2 Drinking-water supply at city scale (15) · 3.3 Sanitation and wastewater (15) · 3.4 Industrial water (10) · 3.5 Agricultural water (15) · 3.6 Water under climate change (15) · 3.7 Failure section: water failures (Flint, Cape Town day zero, Aral Sea, Jakarta sinking) (18)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, ethics. **Project**: assess one city's water resilience using primary data. **Exercises**: 25.
